label: Remove Repetition
snippet: <<Avoid repeating the same points; consolidate duplicate ideas.>>

label: Omit Redundant Asks
snippet: <<Remove overlapping requirements that ask for the same thing twice.>>

label: Cut Filler Phrases
snippet: <<Strip filler language and keep only substantive instructions.>>

label: Shorten Bullets
snippet: <<Keep each bullet to one clear idea without extra clauses.>>

label: Tighten Opening
snippet: <<Make the opening line state the task in one sentence.>>

label: Drop Duplicate Constraints
snippet: <<Remove constraints that restate the same limit elsewhere.>>

label: One Ask Per Bullet
snippet: <<Split bullets that combine multiple unrelated asks.>>

label: Trim Examples Section
snippet: <<Keep at most one short example unless examples are essential.>>

label: Reduce Preamble
snippet: <<Remove throat-clearing before the actual task.>>

label: Limit Scope Verbiage
snippet: <<State scope once; do not restate it in multiple sections.>>

label: Compress Deliverables
snippet: <<List deliverables without repeating format instructions.>>

label: Avoid Restating Goal
snippet: <<Do not repeat the goal after it is already stated clearly.>>

label: Remove Redundant Adjectives
snippet: <<Cut stacked adjectives that do not change meaning.>>

label: Simplify Nested Lists
snippet: <<Flatten nested lists where a single level suffices.>>

label: Cut Meta Commentary
snippet: <<Remove instructions about how to write the answer unless needed.>>

label: Minimize Qualifiers
snippet: <<Replace long qualifier chains with direct requirements.>>

label: Drop Repeated Audience Notes
snippet: <<Mention audience once, not in every section.>>

label: Concise Success Criteria
snippet: <<State success criteria in one compact block.>>

label: Define Key Terms
snippet: <<Define specialized terms on first use.>>

snippet: <<Replace vague 'it/this/that' with explicit nouns.>>
